memoryArtifacts.headline: Jutta may have been born 10 years earlier

Many websites show Jutta as being born in 1040. I will leave a few references below.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guda van Zutphen於1040年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，她的父親Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou23歲，母親Irmentrud Van Zutphen21歲。她於1057年與Ludwig I. von Arnstein結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1118年享年78歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟維茲拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guda van Zutphen于1040年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，她的父亲Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou23岁，母亲Irmentrud Van Zutphen21岁。她于1057年与Ludwig I. von Arnstein结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1118年享年78岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟維茲拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Zutphen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sutphin  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Sutphin
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Van Zutphen: habitational name for someone from Zutphen in the province of Gelderland. Compare Sutfin and Sutphen .

nameMeanings.name: Guda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Guda van Zutphen was born in 1040, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, was 23 and her mother, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, was 21. She married Ludwig I. von Arnstein in 1057. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died in 1118, at the age of 78, and was buried in Wetzlar, Hesse, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guda van Zutphen est née en 1040, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Ludwig I. von Arnstein en 1057. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1118, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Wetzlar, Hessen, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guda van Zutphen 1040 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou 23 und ihre Mutter Irmentrud Van Zutphen 21. Sie hat 1057 Ludwig I. von Arnstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1118 im Alter von 78 Jahren und wurde in Wetzlar, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guda van Zutphen è nata il nel 1040 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Ludwig I. von Arnstein nel 1057. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1118, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Wetzlar, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Guda van Zutphenが1040年にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで生まれた時，父Rupert I von Opper-Lahngouは23歳，母Irmentrud Van Zutphenは21歳であった。1057年にLudwig I. von Arnsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1118年に78歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチヘセンウエトズラーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guda van Zutphen(이)가 1040년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irmentrud Van Zutphen(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1057년 Ludwig I. von Arnstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 헤센 w츠라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guda van Zutphen nasceu em 1040, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Ludwig I. von Arnstein em 1057. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1118, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Wetzlar, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guda van Zutphen родилась в 1040 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Irmentrud Van Zutphen, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ludwig I. von Arnstein в 1057 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1118 г. в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности вецлар, Гессен, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guda van Zutphen nació en 1040, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ludwig I. von Arnstein en 1057. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1118, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Wetzlar, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
